title: Rapper Offset Shot and Hospitalized in Florida: He Is ‘Stable and Being Closely Monitored,’ Says Rep
summary: Rapper Offset was shot in Hollywood, Florida on Monday and is currently being treated at a hospital. Fortunately, he is in stable condition and under observation, according to a spokesperson. Offset is receiving medical care for his gunshot wound, and his team has confirmed the incident, providing an update on his status.
wiki_context: Kiari Kendrell Cephus, known professionally as Offset, is an American rapper, singer, and songwriter. He is best known for being a member of the Atlanta-based hip-hop trio Migos. Formed with fellow rappers Quavo and Takeoff in 2008, the group released four commercially successful studio albums—Yung Rich Nation (2015), Culture (2017), Culture II (2018) and Culture III (2021)—before disbanding in 2023.
enriched_summary: Offset, a renowned American rapper and member of the former hip-hop trio Migos, was shot in Hollywood, Florida on Monday and is currently receiving medical care. Fortunately, he is in stable condition and under observation, according to a spokesperson. As a key figure in Migos, which released four successful studio albums before disbanding in 2023, Offset's incident has likely sent shockwaves through the music industry. His team has confirmed the shooting and is providing updates on his status, and he is being treated for a gunshot wound. Offset's fans will be relieved to know that he is expected to recover, given his current stable condition.

title: Offset shot, hospitalized in Florida
summary: Rapper Offset, a 34-year-old Migos founder, is hospitalized with a non-life threatening gunshot wound after an incident near the Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida. According to his spokesperson, Offset is stable and being closely monitored at the hospital. Two individuals have been detained by police, and the investigation into the shooting is ongoing.
wiki_context: Kiari Kendrell Cephus, known professionally as Offset, is an American rapper, singer, and songwriter. He is best known for being a member of the Atlanta-based hip-hop trio Migos. Formed with fellow rappers Quavo and Takeoff in 2008, the group released four commercially successful studio albums—Yung Rich Nation (2015), Culture (2017), Culture II (2018) and Culture III (2021)—before disbanding in 2023.

title: Offset Shot Near Casino in Florida: ‘He Is Stable and Being Closely Monitored’
summary: Rapper Offset was shot near the Seminole Hard Rock Hotel and Casino in Hollywood, Florida, and is currently hospitalized in stable condition, according to his representative. The details surrounding the shooting are still unknown. This incident comes over three years after the death of Offset's bandmate and cousin, Takeoff, who was shot and killed in Houston at the age of 28.

title: Rapper Offset in stable condition after being shot in Florida, rep says
summary: Rapper Offset, whose real name is Kiari Kendrell Cephus, is in stable condition after being shot near a casino in Hollywood, Florida. A representative for the artist confirmed the shooting and stated that Offset is being closely monitored. The incident was first reported by TMZ, with the police department yet to comment on the matter.
